full_description: FocusForge is a productivity app designed to help you stay focused and avoid distractions. It utilizes the Pomodoro Technique, which involves working in focused 25-minute increments, followed by a 5-minute break. The app provides a simple and intuitive interface, allowing you to easily manage your tasks and track your progress. Key features include: a customizable Pomodoro timer, a task list to keep you organized, and detailed statistics to help you identify areas for improvement. With FocusForge, you can increase your productivity, stay motivated, and achieve your goals. Download now and start forging your focus!
